TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mohamed_Ould_Abdel_Aziz, title = Mohamed_Ould_Abdel_Aziz, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mohamed_Ould_Abdel_Aziz} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 12, Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz , squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Mauritania ta' misuw hya' ga Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz Van der Bellen sa kawas 2005, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

ryax sa tay 20 nqu tay 12, Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz , squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1956) mrhuw Mauritania ta' misuw hya' ga Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz, aring ryax tay 5 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2009 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. mintzyuwaw nya Mohamed Ould Abdel Aziz Van der Bellen sa kawas 2005, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, moħame* oul* aβ*el aziz , s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw mauritania taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa moħame* oul* aβ*el aziz, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. mintzjuwaw nja moħame* oul* aβ*el aziz *an *er βellen s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~ɕezi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
